positive: A maximalist abstract tropical fauna composition featuring stylized bioluminescent rainforest elements. The central motif is a symmetrical arrangement of jungle vines, fantastical iridescent butterflies, glowing exotic mushrooms, and graceful orchid silhouettes. Focus on strong, clean black and white negative space contrasts accented by vibrant, glowing neon cyan and electric magenta highlights. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel, utilizing repeating patterns and clean vector-like edges. Style: High-contrast graphic novel meets Art Deco engraving, intricate linework, deep negative space, perfect symmetry, sticker design, minimalist maximalism.
negative: artifacts, blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, cropped, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, realistic photo, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts, logos
